channel.title: Product on thingsithinkithink
channel.description: Recent content in Product on thingsithinkithink

item.title: The Embedded AI Trio
item.description: One of my favourite writers on AI isn’t really someone you’d consider an “AI guy.” It’s Ethan Mollick, the Wharton professor of business who wrote one of the first good books about our current AI moment, Co-Intelligence. That book formed the basis of my first AI enablement workshops. What I love about Ethan is that he takes AI seriously without sounding like a sci-fi author. He’s grounded in how real work actually gets done.
